title: sterculia shillinglawii subsp. malacophylla
intro: Sterculia shillinglawii subsp. malacophylla, also known as the Malacophylla Sterculia, is a plant species within the Sterculia genus, belonging to the family Malvaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Sterculia shillinglawii subsp. malacophylla is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or ointments, which can be applied topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
